title: Lesson 56: Prepositions (Who, that, for, with, etc.) in detail
concepts: Time to look at how we can use prepositions (words like Who, that. for. with, etc.) with the different tenses and sentence forms we have learned so far.

sentences.english: For (you)
For (two hours)
From / of
With
In/on
Where are you from?
Where are you going to?
We are going to the United States
The girl that I work with
The girl with which I work
The girl with whom I work

sentences.spanish: Es la chica con que trabajaba
sentences.english: It is the girl that I was working with

sentences.spanish: La chica con que iba a la fiesta
sentences.english: The girl that I was going to the party with
Which (one) do you want?
I don't know which (one) he wants
I don't know which (one) he wants to see

sentences.spanish: No se con cúal quiere hacerlo
sentences.english: I don't know with which (one) he wants to do it
Who is going?
Who is going?
Who is here?
Who is here?
Are you there? (informal)

sentences.spanish: No se con quien tengo que hacerlo
sentences.english: I don't know with who I have to do it

sentences.spanish: No se para quien tengo que hacerlo
sentences.english: I don't know for who I have to do it

sentences.spanish: No se por quien tengo que hacerlo
sentences.english: I don't know because of who I have to do it

sentences.spanish: No se por quien lo tengo que hacer
sentences.english: I don't know because of who I have to do it
